General.Name: Ibi Group Holdings Ltd
General.Description: IBI Group Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, offers interior fitting out, building refurbishments, and other building services in Hong Kong, Macau, and Ireland. It operates through Contracting, Building Solutions, Strategic Investments, and Property Investments segments. The company provides products and services with a focus on air quality, energy efficiency, and modern sustainable building materials; and invests in listed securities and property development business. It serves organizations and commercial enterprises, including banks, hotels and casino operators, racing and betting operators, and property developers. IBI Group Holdings Limited was founded in 1997 and is headquartered in Hong Kong, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Bangkok Bank Building, Hong Kong, Hong Kong
